Why Laser Treatment

The Smarter Way to Clear Skin

Advanced selective laser technology that targets excess melanin, breaks up brown spots and age spots, and stimulates collagen — revealing clearer, younger-looking skin.

🎯
Clinically Proven

Laser treatment is a well-established, medically recognised method for reversing visible sun damage and pigmentation — with decades of clinical evidence behind it.

💫
No Pain & No Downtime

Our laser heats inner skin layers without damaging the surface. Clients resume normal activities immediately after each session — no recovery period required.

🛡️
No Side Effects

Minor temporary redness or swelling may occur and typically subsides within days. No systemic risks, no medications, no drug interactions.

🌍
All Skin Types

Our pigment-specific selective lasers safely treat all skin types and tones — designed to target melanin precisely without affecting surrounding healthy tissue.

⚡
Highly Effective

Results can last for years. Laser clears brown spots, seals broken blood vessels, stimulates collagen production, and dramatically improves skin texture.

🏆
20+ Years Experience

DR. INDIRA KHURANA Ph.D., I.M.D. has treated all types of skin pigmentation and sun damage for over two decades — thousands of successful treatments across the GTA.

The Process

How Laser Pigmentation Treatment Works

01
Target Melanin

We use pigment-specific selective lasers to safely target excess melanin in the skin — the cause of brown spots, age spots, and uneven skin tone.

02
Break Up Pigmentation

The laser energy breaks apart the brown spots and age spots, seals broken blood vessels, and stimulates collagen production for smoother texture.

03
Natural Healing

Your skin naturally clears the fragmented pigment. Fine lines smooth, texture improves dramatically — with results that often last for years.

📋
How Many Sessions?

The number of sessions depends on your skin type and severity of damage — determined only after a physical assessment at your free no-obligation consultation.
